feedbacks.title: Outbound order filter not saving
feedbacks.description: When I select '单品多件' in the order type filter, it resets back to default after clicking search.
feedbacks.internalNotes: Investigating local storage state sync issue.

feedbacks.title: Add bulk exception package resolution
feedbacks.description: We need a button to select multiple barcode mismatch exception packages and mark them resolved in one click instead of doing them individually.
feedbacks.internalNotes: Discussed with team, will prioritize in next release.

feedbacks.title: Inventory quantity mismatch for HC-001
feedbacks.description: Physical count at location A-3-2 shows 12 units of HC-001 but the system records 18. Need discrepancy reconciliation.

feedbacks.title: Make picking task priority easier to compare
feedbacks.description: The priority indicators on the picking list are all black text. Can we use colored tags (red for high, yellow for medium) so operators can easily compare?

feedbacks.title: Carrier label generation failed
feedbacks.description: Failed to generate carrier labels for USPS Ground shipments. Error message: "API Authentication Error with USPS API".

feedbacks.title: Inbound ASN detail drawer layout broken
feedbacks.description: On smaller screens, the ASN detail drawer close button is hidden under the header and the items list overflow is broken.

feedbacks.title: Add Slack notification for delayed inbound shipments
feedbacks.description: It would be great if the system sends a Slack alert when an ASN status is 'Delayed' for more than 4 hours.
feedbacks.internalNotes: Need to check Slack webhook integration.

feedbacks.title: Storage fee calculation looks incorrect for customer NiceC
feedbacks.description: Storage fee computed for June is $1450, but based on cubic volume calculation it should be $1230.
feedbacks.internalNotes: Reviewing volume calculation logic in Billing module.

feedbackComments.comment: We will look into this in the next sprint.
